title: Dehumidifiers: 5 Top-Rated Picks on Amazon.com Compared

body:

Quick Take

  • Highest rated: Midea 1,500 Sq. Ft. Energy Star Certified Dehumidifier With Reusabl... at 4.4/5 (7,041 reviews).
  • Most reviewed: Waykar 80 Pints Energy Star Dehumidifier for Spaces up to 5,000 Sq...., with 21,877 verified reviews - the largest track record in this comparison.
  • Best value / lowest price: Dehumidifier, 35 OZ Small Dehumidifiers for Bedroom for Home, Quiet... at $46.99.

If you’re unsure, the highest-rated option is the lower-risk pick; the lowest-priced option is reasonable if price is your primary constraint.

Frequently Asked Questions

What size dehumidifier do I need for my room?

Capacity is rated in pints removed per day and should scale with room size and humidity level - a small unit suits a single damp room, while a whole-basement or very humid space typically needs a higher-pint-rated unit; oversizing wastes money, undersizing won’t keep up.

How loud are dehumidifiers in everyday use?

Most run at a noticeable but not disruptive level for a basement or utility room, though it can be intrusive in a bedroom - check for a stated noise level or a "quiet mode" if you plan to run one overnight in a living space.

Do I need to empty the water tank manually, or can it drain continuously?

Most models include both a removable tank for manual emptying and a continuous-drain hose option for use near a floor drain or sump - continuous drainage is worth checking for if you don’t want to empty a tank daily in a very humid space.

Does an Energy Star rating matter for a dehumidifier?

Yes - dehumidifiers run for extended periods in humid conditions, so an Energy Star-certified model can meaningfully reduce electricity costs over a season of continuous use compared to a non-certified unit of similar capacity.

As an Amazon Associate, ChampionsReviews.com earns from qualifying purchases. Prices, ratings, and availability shown are pulled from Amazon.com at the time of publishing and are subject to change.
